title: prunella alba
intro: Prunella alba, also known as White Prunella or Selfheal, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Prunella alba include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting antiviral and antifungal properties. Prunella alba can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically in the form of salves and creams to promote wound healing and skin health.
